body:
So that `Simulation` can be called with the same arguments whether the Reactant extension is loaded or not. This will fix the ReactantExt tests that have been failing in ClimaOcean since https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaOcean.jl/pull/778

Tag patch release so this can be used downstream
title: (0.107.4) unify Simulation interface in ReactantExt

body:
## Summary

This PR fixes `interpolate!` on flat-topology source grids when explicit coordinates are provided in flat directions.

## What changed

`src/Fields/interpolate.jl`
- Added `_fractional_indices` overloads for 3-tuple nodes on flat topologies.
- Flat directions now correctly return `nothing` in `FractionalIndices` instead of falling back to the generic 3D path.

`test/test_field.jl`
- Added a regression test for the reported `XYFlatGrid` case.
- Added a compact regression test for a representative partially flat case.

## Root cause

`interpolate!` forms a full node tuple via `_node(...)`. For flat grids with explicit coordinates in flat directions, that tuple can be 3D even though the source field is lower-dimensional. Existing `_fractional_indices` dispatch only handled reduced-arity tuples like `(z,)`, so dispatch fell through to the generic 3D method and produced invalid interpolation indices in flat directions.

## Impact

This preserves support for explicit coordinates on flat directions while ensuring those directions do not participate in interpolation.

## Validation

- `julia --project=. test/test_field.jl`
title: Fix interpolate! on flat topologies with explicit coordinates
